---
title: "Palaeoverse Module Library"
listing:
  contents: "modules/*/index.qmd"
  type: grid                    # or "default" / "table"
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true              # tag chips that filter on click
  filter-ui: true               # search box over title/description/categories
  sort-ui: true                 # dropdown to re-sort
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
  feed: true                    # RSS for free
---

This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.
